title: Dev Properties & Construction (Lucknow) marketing website — frontend

requirements.summary: Apply a responsive premium blue/white visual theme with modern typography and real-estate/construction visuals across the site.
acceptanceCriteria: Site uses a consistent blue/white palette and modern font styling across all sections
All pages/sections are mobile-first and scale cleanly to desktop
Visuals used throughout the site clearly relate to real estate and construction

file_operations.description: Create global Tailwind layers and set CSS variables for a clean blue/white theme (primary/foreground/background), base typography, and consistent section spacing for a modern premium look.
Create the single-page marketing layout (header + sections + footer) with responsive containers and composition-first styling to achieve the modern, trustworthy look.

requirements.summary: Implement responsive navigation for Home, About Us, Services, Properties, Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, and Contact Us.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes links for all requested sections
Clicking a navigation item takes the user to the corresponding section (via dedicated routes or in-page anchors)
Navigation works on mobile (e.g., collapsible menu) and desktop

file_operations.description: Create a responsive header with desktop nav links and a mobile collapsible menu (use shadcn/ui primitives such as Sheet/Button to support the menu). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire SiteHeader into the app and connect nav items to section anchors/ids for Home/About/Services/Properties/Construction/Why/Testimonials/Contact.

requirements.summary: Add prominent CTAs labeled exactly “Get Free Consultation”, “List Your Property”, and “Book Site Visit” with themed primary/secondary styling.
acceptanceCriteria: All three CTA labels appear on the site as clickable buttons/links
At least one CTA is visible above the fold on the Home section
CTAs are visually emphasized (primary/secondary button styling consistent with the theme)

file_operations.description: Implement above-the-fold hero CTAs, ensuring at least one primary CTA is visible immediately (use shadcn/ui Button for consistent styling). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add secondary CTAs within services content (including “List Your Property” and/or “Book Site Visit”) to reinforce conversion points (use shadcn/ui Button). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a CTA area near the inquiry form to include remaining required CTA labels as clickable actions that scroll/focus users into the form (use shadcn/ui Button). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create the Home hero section introducing the company (Lucknow; 15 years experience; services summary) with a primary CTA.
acceptanceCriteria: Home hero clearly states company name and location (Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India)
Home includes a visible mention of “15 years of experience”
Home includes a brief list/summary of core offerings (buy/sell/resell, property management, construction)

file_operations.description: Add hero copy explicitly stating “Dev Properties & Construction”, “Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India”, “15 years of experience”, and a short offerings summary; include at least one primary CTA button.
Render HeroSection as the Home section with a stable anchor id for navigation (e.g., #home).

requirements.summary: Create an About Us section describing the company with a trust-building tone and local expertise in Lucknow.
acceptanceCriteria: About Us content is written in English and references 15 years of experience
Tone is professional and trust-building (no placeholder lorem ipsum)

file_operations.description: Write English About Us content emphasizing trust, local expertise in Lucknow, and 15 years of experience; include a premium, simple layout.
Wire AboutSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #about).

requirements.summary: Create a Services section listing and describing buying, selling, reselling, property management, and construction services.
acceptanceCriteria: All five services are explicitly listed
Each service has a short English description that is not placeholder text
Services layout is responsive and visually consistent (cards or similar)

file_operations.description: Implement a responsive card/grid layout listing all five services with concise English descriptions (use shadcn/ui Card for consistent premium styling). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ServicesSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #services).

requirements.summary: Create a Properties section with Buy/Sell/Rent category switching and representative property cards per category.
acceptanceCriteria: Properties section has clear Buy/Sell/Rent category switching
Each category shows at least 3 representative cards/items
Property cards have consistent structure (e.g., title, location, price label, quick CTA)

file_operations.description: Implement a Properties section with a tab/segmented switch between Buy/Sell/Rent (use shadcn/ui Tabs), each showing at least 3 static property cards with consistent fields and a quick CTA. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire PropertiesSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #properties).

requirements.summary: Create a Construction section describing construction offerings and a premium process overview (planning/design/execution/quality/timelines).
acceptanceCriteria: Construction section includes a clear summary of construction services
Construction section includes at least 3 process/highlight points (e.g., quality, timeline, transparency)

file_operations.description: Create construction offerings copy and a process/highlights list (minimum 3 points) aligned to a premium, trustworthy tone.
Wire ConstructionSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #construction).

requirements.summary: Create a Why Choose Us section with at least 5 value propositions tailored to the business.
acceptanceCriteria: Why Choose Us section contains at least 5 distinct bullet/value items
At least one item references 15 years of experience

file_operations.description: Create a value-proposition section with at least 5 distinct items including 15 years experience, local expertise, transparent dealing, end-to-end support, and quality construction.
Wire WhyChooseUsSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #why-choose-us).

requirements.summary: Create a premium Testimonials section showing at least 3 example testimonials in English.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 testimonial cards are shown
Testimonials are readable, professional, and consistent with a premium theme

file_operations.description: Create a testimonials section with at least 3 premium-styled testimonial cards using generic names/initials (use shadcn/ui Card for consistent layout). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire TestimonialsSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #testimonials).

requirements.summary: Create the Contact Us section with exact contact details and an inquiry form (name, phone, email, message) that validates required fields and shows success on submit.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays phone: +91 85659 64384
Contact section displays email: devproperties44@gmail.com
Contact section displays address: A 158 near Kalandi Park, Sector 16, Vrindavan Colony, Lucknow 226029
Contact form validates required fields and shows a success state on submit

file_operations.description: Render the phone/email/address exactly as provided and compose in the ContactForm component; ensure required fields are validated and a clear success state is shown after submission.

Implement the inquiry form UI with client-side required-field validation and submit handling using React Query to call the backend capability submitContactForm; show success/error feedback without page reload (use shadcn/ui Input/Textarea/Button and an Alert for feedback). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ContactSection into the page with a navigation anchor id (e.g., #contact) and ensure the section is reachable from primary CTAs.

requirements.summary: Add a floating WhatsApp button and make phone/email clickable via tel: and mailto: links.
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp floating button is visible on all pages/sections and opens WhatsApp chat for +91 85659 64384
Phone number link uses tel: and works on mobile
Email link uses mailto: and opens the user’s email client

file_operations.description: Create a fixed-position WhatsApp action button that opens a WhatsApp chat to +91 85659 64384 using the appropriate wa.me link formatting and accessible labeling.
Ensure displayed phone and email are rendered as clickable tel: and mailto: links (and keep the visible text exactly as provided).
Ensure footer contact details also use tel: and mailto: links for phone/email while displaying the exact provided text.
Render WhatsAppFloatingButton at the app root so it appears across all sections.

requirements.summary: Add a consistent footer with company name, quick links, and provided contact details.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer appears on all pages/sections
Footer includes phone, email, and address exactly as provided
Footer includes navigation links to main sections

file_operations.description: Implement footer content with company name, quick links to all main sections, and the exact provided phone/email/address in a premium blue/white style.
Wire SiteFooter into the app layout so it renders consistently across the entire single-page site.

requirements.summary: Ensure all copy is English with no placeholder text and show “Dev Properties & Construction” prominently in header branding.
acceptanceCriteria: No lorem ipsum/placeholder content is visible
Company name appears in header/branding area on the site

file_operations.description: Add prominent header branding text “Dev Properties & Construction” and ensure navigation labels are in English and consistent.
Review and adjust section copy to ensure all user-facing text is English and non-placeholder, maintaining a professional tone.
Ensure all service descriptions are English and non-placeholder across all cards.

requirements.summary: Render the generated static visual assets from frontend/public/assets/generated in the UI (hero, icons, and section backgrounds).
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are used in the UI (e.g., hero, section imagery, or icons)
Images load correctly in production build without being served from the backend

file_operations.description: Use the generated hero image as the hero visual/background: frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-real-estate-construction.dim_1600x800.png.
Use the generated icons sprite for the five service items: frontend/public/assets/generated/services-icons-sprite.dim_800x200.png (e.g., as a sprite-based or split icon presentation).
Apply the generated subtle architectural background to appropriate sections via layout wrappers: frontend/public/assets/generated/section-bg-architecture.dim_1600x900.png.
Use the generated testimonials background texture/pattern in the testimonials section: frontend/public/assets/generated/testimonials-bg.dim_1600x600.png.
